data.title: Milestone 6: full eval suite (§10) + navi CLI client

data.body: Review (fresh-context sub-agent): PASS. Verified 6877924 live: ruff clean, mypy clean (17 files), pytest 98 passed + 1 skipped in ~2s (no network). navi --help works; navi ask with no server -> stderr error + exit 1, no hang/traceback. §10 floors all met (path-graded): routing 12, tool-permission 12, injection 10, egress 6, budget 5, SAP goldens 10. Injection evals are REAL path tests — assert persisted trace verdicts==['denied'] (would fail if broker allowed); exercise unknown-tool + egress backstops. Tool-permission spans allow-read-only + deny unknown/scope/args/egress/ghost/disabled/write-kind. Budget asserts truncated + stopped on budget gate not iteration cap (walked 'nickel' scenario). Routing grades dispatched route; low-conf->clarify + high-risk->refuse verify code-overrides-model. 10 distinct realistic SAP goldens + structure assert. CLI thin HTTP client (§6.8), tested via TestClient, handles SAP markdown + 404. No write tools/Agent SDK/server tools; [project.scripts] correct. Holistic: read-only MVP (§2) COMPLETE across M1–M6, no blocking gap; only post-MVP item is egress hardening (tracked NAVI-6). 3 non-blocking nits (120s read-timeout could hang on an accept-then-stall server — post-MVP). -> done.
